category_sources: Official GitHub README describes MassDNS as a high-performance DNS stub resolver for bulk lookups; source_facts.description matches.
display_name_sources: Official README uses MassDNS; source_facts.name is massdns.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents compilation and CLI usage/options for massdns.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/blechschmidt/massdns, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes high-volume DNS resolving and reconnaissance/subdomain enumeration; source_facts.executables lists massdns.
